description: A poller reconfirming an entity's durable pre-restart state on its first post-boot observation must not synthesize a transition, even though a later genuine transition to the same target value does fire normally.

events.note: reconfirms the durable pre-restart value; engine well past any stabilization window by the time of event 3

results.reason: first post-restart observation compared against durable last-recorded value; unchanged, not a transition
